_comment: School Buddy — Azure deployment parameters. Sensitive values must be stored as GitHub Secrets (see CICD_HANDOVER.md). Update placeholder values before first deployment.

image._comment_tagStrategy: Options: 'sha' (git short SHA, recommended), 'semver' (e.g. v1.2.3), 'latest' (not recommended for production)

appSettings._comment_RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS: 0 = skip db/migrations on boot (backup-only). 1 = run migrations (and schema_migrations ledger).
appSettings._secrets_comment: POSTGRES_PASSWORD_SCHOOL_BUDDY, ACR_USERNAME_SCHOOL_BUDDY, ACR_PASSWORD_SCHOOL_BUDDY, GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY — store in GitHub Secrets; never put secret values here
